form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (20.19) when fifth over 342m at this track in a Other. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and 10 places from 19 starts. Looks one of the chances.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 19.84, beating Aston Biden. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 400m at Gawler behind Zipping Botham beaten 13 lengths (23.83). Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th on April 5 over 531m at Gawler behind Big Diesel beaten 9 lengths (31.76) in a Grade 6. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 342m in 19.70. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when sixth over 342m at this track at Grade 6 level. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
